proposal1.heroHeadline: Gmail is losing 2,000 hours a year on manual proposal creation. Here's how to stop the bleed.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, Gmail spends hours crafting each proposal. With our AI system, proposals are ready in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: These are the ongoing losses that Gmail faces without automation.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Gmail spends over 2,000 hours annually drafting proposals. Every hour not spent on innovation is a lost opportunity.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Manual proposal creation costs Gmail an estimated $150,000 per year in salaries. That's capital drained from growth.

problems.title: Missed Opportunities
problems.description: Slow proposals mean missed deals. A delay of just one day can cost Gmail potential partnerships worth thousands.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Proposals vary in style and quality, confusing prospects. A cohesive brand message could increase client trust and retention.

problems.title: Error Prone
problems.description: Manual processes lead to errors, risking Gmail's reputation. Correcting mistakes drains additional resources.

problems.title: Limited Scalability
problems.description: Current processes cap Gmail's ability to scale proposal output. Each proposal requires manual input, limiting growth.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system transforms Gmail's proposal creation, eliminating all the above inefficiencies.

solutions.title: Instant Proposals
solutions.description: Currently, crafting proposals takes hours of manual effort. Our system delivers complete proposals in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: High labor costs drain resources. Our AI cuts those costs by automating the proposal process.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals lead to inconsistent messages. Our AI ensures every proposal is on-brand and professional.

solutions.title: Error Elimination
solutions.description: Errors are common in manual processes. Our system reduces errors, protecting Gmail's reputation.

solutions.title: Scalable Processes
solutions.description: Current methods limit output. Our AI scales with Gmail, enabling more proposals with the same resources.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Gmail's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Gmail around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Gmail.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Boost Acme Corp's Efficiency with Gmail's Intuitive Solutions
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We propose a strategic plan to transform your communication and collaboration systems using Gmail's innovative services.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently experiencing significant losses due to inefficiencies in communication.

problems.title: Communication Delays
problems.description: Every minute spent waiting for emails to load or searching through cluttered inboxes is productivity lost. This affects your team's ability to respond quickly to business opportunities.

problems.title: Storage Limitations
problems.description: Running out of storage can cause delays in accessing important emails and attachments. This limits your team's ability to handle large volumes of communication efficiently.

problems.title: Spam Overload
problems.description: High volumes of spam disrupt daily operations and lead to important emails being missed. This results in potential business opportunities slipping through the cracks.

problems.title: Mobile Access Issues
problems.description: Without seamless mobile access, your team is tethered to their desks. This hampers their ability to work flexibly and respond to urgent matters on the go.

problems.title: Security Vulnerabilities
problems.description: Every security breach risks sensitive data and damages trust with clients. This can lead to financial losses and reputational damage.

problems.title: Inefficient Collaboration
problems.description: Without integrated tools for collaboration, team projects take longer to complete. This delays project delivery and affects client satisfaction.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our tailored solutions address these challenges directly, enhancing Acme Corp's operational efficiency.

solutions.title: Gmail
solutions.description: Streamline communication with Gmail’s intuitive interface and advanced search capabilities. This enhances team productivity by reducing time spent on email management.

solutions.title: Google Drive
solutions.description: Securely store and access large files from anywhere with Google Drive. This ensures your team never runs out of space and can work without interruption.

solutions.title: Google Workspace Security
solutions.description: Protect your data with Google Workspace's robust security features. This minimizes risks of data breaches and ensures client trust.

solutions.title: Gmail Mobile App
solutions.description: Enable your team to work on the go with the Gmail mobile app. This ensures they can respond to important emails promptly, regardless of location.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Gmail offers a unique combination of intuitive design and robust functionality.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Results
whyUsCards.description: We have a track record of enhancing communication efficiency for businesses like yours.

whyUsCards.title: Advanced Technology
whyUsCards.description: Our tools are designed to provide seamless integration and advanced search capabilities.

whyUsCards.title: Security Focused
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize security to protect your sensitive information.

whyUsCards.title: Global Accessibility
whyUsCards.description: Our mobile solutions ensure your team can work effectively from anywhere.

proposal2.teamIntro: Meet the team dedicated to transforming Acme Corp's communication.

team.name: there
team.bio: Leading strategy and client relationships with a focus on communication efficiency. Overseeing successful email system integrations for businesses worldwide.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Deploying Gmail solutions tailored to your needs.

process.title: Optimization
process.description: Ensuring everything runs smoothly and efficiently.

process.title: Training & Support
process.description: Empowering your team with the tools and knowledge they need.
